description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the php:7.4 Docker image with a global before_script that runs apt-get update -yqq, installs wget git zip unzip, installs Composer via curl, installs Xdebug with pecl install xdebug-beta and enables it, then runs php composer.phar install. Define three jobs in the test stage: test:php7.2 using the php:7.2 image that executes vendor/bin/phpunit --configuration phpunit.xml --coverage-text --colors=never; test:php7.3 using the php:7.3 image that executes the same phpunit command; and test:php7.4 using the php:7.4 image that also executes the same phpunit command. All jobs inherit the before_script and have allow_failure set to false.
